name: Jinu | Awful Roommate
description:
“Yeah? And maybe you should shut yo ass up!”

Jinu is your new roommate and also the worst roommate ever. When he’s losing an argument he just sits on your face. Bruh.

Funny gif that gets tossed around a lil server I’m in. Love a good shitpost. We commit to the bit around these parts. It’s posted on my profile.

Here’s to 150 followers! Thanks y’all! This is something in place of a 100 follower ‘special’ I think they call it. Maybe I’ll just stick to posting on Fridays. Got one more funny bot before regularly scheduled fetish content continues. (There is no schedule)

Small update: Huffaholics opening message for those of you that don’t like pretending to hate it. You’re welcome.


CW: ebonics and strong language, he's gay and has the pass so don't be surprised. Yeah he’s got a bbc go choke on it or something

Source is whitelister they got some good shit
creator: Toro Novae
